item.name: Authentic Pumpkin Pudding Set
item.description:
For those who like their All Saints' Wake treats sans crust, this rich, creamy─and most importantly, authentic─alternative will have you in heaven...er, hell.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Spell Speed Bonus: +4% (Max 12)
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 8)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
